description: Cyclic peptides, with their unique structures, offer higher target affinity, metabolic stability, and membrane penetration than linear peptides, making them a focus in drug development. However, their complex conformations and verification challenges hinder their design. CD ComputaBio uses a top computational biology platform, combining AI, MD simulations, and QM calculations to offer comprehensive cyclic peptide modeling services, from design to evaluation, overcoming traditional experimental limitations.
name: Cyclic Peptide Modeling Services
